page_content: INST377 Dynamic Web Applications (3 Credits) An exploration of the basic methods and tools for developing dynamic, database-driven websites, including acquiring, installing, and running web servers, database servers, and connectability applications. Prerequisite: 1 course with a minimum grade of C- from (INST201, INST301, or BSOS233); and minimum grade of C- in INST327, STAT100, and MATH115 (or higher). Restriction: Restricted to Information Science and Social Data Science. Credit Only Granted for: INST377 or BMGT406.
